title: HSL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Medical Officer, Senior Consultant Posts
description: The Hindustan Shipyard Limited (HSL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Medical Officers and Senior Consultant Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, MBA, B.E./B. Tech can apply for the HSL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details...
